input_sentence: We need to be mindful of the fact that some patients may not be comfortable with their healthcare providers being openly gay.
raw_output: {"category": "Tone Policing", "severity": "Potentially Offensive", "explanation": "Prioritizes the comfort of a patient who might be prejudiced over the right of a healthcare provider to be open about their identity."}

parsed_output.explanation: Prioritizes the comfort of a patient who might be prejudiced over the right of a healthcare provider to be open about their identity.

gold_label.explanation: Prioritizes the comfort of the majority (or those with biases) over the right of individuals to be their authentic selves in professional settings.
